title: viola × salvatoriana
intro: Viola × salvatoriana, also known as the hybrid pansy, is a plant species that belongs to the violet family and is a cross between Viola sororia and Viola sororia var. sororia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola × salvatoriana include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
